name: Yangshuo Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Yangshuo coverage with a focus on scenery-led pacing, side trips, and balancing river views with practical route choices.
fullBio: The Yangshuo Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Yangshuo. Its focus is helping readers use the area for scenery, cycling, rafting, and shorter side trips without overloading a short stay or mistaking every famous photo stop for a half-day requirement.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for scenic-route logic, weather sensitivity, transfer fit, and whether the guidance still reflects practical Yangshuo travel patterns.
seoTitle: Yangshuo Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Yangshuo guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
